communications.title: 🇨🇭 Swiss Client Etiquette & Messaging Templates
communications.summary: Professional greeting and follow-up templates in Swiss national languages:

communicationTemplate.greeting: Grüezi Frau/Herr [Name], vielen Dank für Ihre Anfrage bezüglich [Project].
communicationTemplate.scopeConfirmation: Ich habe die Details geprüft und stehe am gewünschten Termin gerne zur Verfügung.

actionPoints: 🤝 **Use Formal Greetings**: Always start with 'Grüezi' (German) or 'Bonjour' (French) in initial client interactions.
⏰ **Punctuality Benchmark**: In Switzerland, arriving 5 minutes early is considered standard professional etiquette.
